messages.content: Leave my contact details on the website.
ASK_USER "Please provide the official website URL and the form values to fill, such as name, email, and message."
到官网登录后看看控制台页面。
ASK_USER "Please provide the login page URL, username, and password. If I should enter a specific page after login, please provide that path too."
把页面上的标题和链接整理一下。
ASK_USER "Please provide the page URL, or tell me which website/page I should open first."
帮我看看最近关于 Anthropic 的新闻。
ASK_USER "Which website should I use, or should I use a general search engine?"
打开那个页面以后帮我点一下指定按钮。
ASK_USER "Please provide the page URL and specify which button or target element you want me to interact with."
Check why the login button is disabled on example.com/login and inspect the page state first.

browser navigate https://example.com/login
browser screenshot
browser observe "Find the login button and report whether it is enabled or disabled"
browser observe "Find the username and password input fields and whether they are required"
browser close
帮我排查一下 example.com/form 的提交按钮为什么没反应，先把页面状态和证据抓出来。

browser navigate https://example.com/form
browser screenshot
browser observe "Find all buttons and their states"
browser observe "Find all form input fields and their required status"
browser act "Fill in all required fields with test data"
browser screenshot
browser observe "Check if the submit button is now enabled"
browser close
帮我下载一下这个 CSV：data.example.org/exports/orders.csv

browser navigate https://data.example.org/exports/orders.csv
browser act "Wait for 5 seconds for the download to complete"
browser close
Download this PDF for me: download.demo-site.test/brochure.pdf

browser navigate https://download.demo-site.test/brochure.pdf
browser act "Wait for 5 seconds for the download to complete"
browser close
打开 Reddit r/MachineLearning 首页，把前 5 条帖子标题和链接提取出来。

browser navigate https://www.reddit.com/r/MachineLearning/
browser extract "Extract the top 5 post titles and URLs from the homepage" '{"posts":[{"title":"string","url":"string"}]}'
browser close
Check the latest tech news on TechCrunch and extract the top 6 headlines, summaries, authors, and published dates for later summarization.

browser navigate https://techcrunch.com
browser extract "Extract the top 6 article headlines and their summaries" '{"articles":[{"headline":"string","summary":"string","author":"string","publishedDate":"string"}]}'
browser close
帮我打开 example.com/product/1509，把 product name, price 和其他商品信息抓出来。

browser navigate https://example.com/product/1509
browser extract "Extract the product information" '{"productName":"string","price":"number","currency":"string","inStock":"boolean","rating":"number","reviewCount":"number"}'
browser close
Go to langchain-ai/langchain on GitHub and grab the repository overview and star count.

browser navigate https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain
browser extract "Extract the repository name, short description, and star count" '{"repository":"string","description":"string","stars":"string"}'
browser close
到 https://support.example.org/contact-us 帮我 submit contact form，姓名 Alice Chen，邮箱 bob@example.com，留言 Can someone get back to me about the API plan?。 截图确认一下。

browser navigate https://support.example.org/contact-us
browser act "Fill in the name field with 'Alice Chen'"
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'bob@example.com'"
browser act "Fill in the message field with 'Can someone get back to me about the API plan?'"
browser act "Click the Submit button"
browser screenshot
browser close
Please fill out the feedback form at support.example.org/feedback: Alice Chen, john.doe@example.com, 'The checkout page is confusing'.

browser navigate https://support.example.org/feedback
browser act "Fill in the name field with 'Alice Chen'"
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'john.doe@example.com'"
browser act "Fill in the message field with 'The checkout page is confusing'"
browser act "Click the Submit button"
browser close
Sign me up for the newsletter on updates.example.org/subscribe with emma.li@example.com. Screenshot the confirmation page.

browser navigate https://updates.example.org/subscribe
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'emma.li@example.com'"
browser act "Click the Subscribe button"
browser screenshot
browser close
Go to docs.python.org/3/, collect the top navigation items, and check for a visible login button.

browser navigate https://docs.python.org/3/
browser observe "List the top navigation menu items"
browser observe "Check whether there is a visible login button on the page"
browser close
帮我登录 app.demo-site.test，用户名 emma_liu，密码 S3cur3Pwd!，然后进入 dashboard。

browser navigate https://app.demo-site.test/login
browser act "Fill in the username field with 'emma_liu'"
browser act "Fill in the password field with 'S3cur3Pwd!'"
browser act "Click the Login button"
browser act "Wait for the page to fully load"
browser navigate https://app.demo-site.test/dashboard
browser close
帮我分析一下这个项目风险。
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
帮我 fix 一下这段 Python code 里的 bug。
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
请把这段文章压缩成三句话。
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
Translate this sentence into English.
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
去 openai.com/pricing 看一下，直接给我截个图。

browser navigate https://openai.com/pricing
browser screenshot
browser close
Go through the first 2 pages on store.example.net/items and collect all product details.

browser navigate https://store.example.net/items
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser close
帮我从 careers.example.org/openings 的前 2 页招聘列表里抓职位名称和工作地点。

browser navigate https://careers.example.org/openings
browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
browser close
Go to Google, look up 'browser automation stagehand github', click the 1th result, and extract the page title and the first two introductory paragraphs.

browser navigate https://www.google.com
browser act "Type 'browser automation stagehand github' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser act "Click the 1st search result"
browser act "Wait for the page to fully load"
browser extract "Extract the page title and the first two introductory paragraphs" '{"pageTitle":"string","introParagraph1":"string","introParagraph2":"string"}'
browser close
Search Bing for 'Seattle weather this weekend' and extract the top 6 results.

browser navigate https://www.bing.com
browser act "Type 'Seattle weather this weekend' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 6 search results" '{"results":[{"title":"string","url":"string","snippet":"string"}]}'
browser close
Go to OpenAI Docs, search for 'authentication', and collect the top 5 matches.

browser navigate https://platform.openai.com/docs
browser act "Type 'authentication' in the documentation search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 5 search results" '{"results":[{"title":"string","url":"string","snippet":"string"}]}'
browser close
帮我在 YouTube 里查 LoRA fine tuning tutorial，提取前 5 条视频结果。

browser navigate https://www.youtube.com/
browser act "Type 'LoRA fine tuning tutorial' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 5 video titles and their channel names" '{"videos":[{"title":"string","channel":"string"}]}'
browser close
